title: usestrix/strix
friendlyTitle: Strix uses AI to help find security problems
summary: Strix is an open-source AI penetration-testing tool designed to help find and fix application vulnerabilities.
friendlySummary: Strix is an open-source tool for testing apps for vulnerabilities with AI help.
whyItMatters: Security teams and developers can use it to explore AI-assisted vulnerability discovery in controlled environments, then turn findings into fixes before issues reach production.
friendlyWhyItMatters: It can help teams find weaknesses earlier, as long as it is used responsibly on systems they own or are allowed to test.
